scripts.build:staging: tsc && vite build --mode staging && contentful-app-scripts build-functions --ci
scripts.deploy: npm run build && contentful-app-scripts upload --ci --bundle-dir ./build --organization-id ${DEFINITIONS_ORG_ID} --definition-id 1O8njPYTGO44VueSJNBrdZ --token ${CONTENTFUL_CMA_TOKEN} && contentful-app-scripts upsert-actions --ci --organization-id ${DEFINITIONS_ORG_ID} --definition-id 1O8njPYTGO44VueSJNBrdZ --token ${CONTENTFUL_CMA_TOKEN}
scripts.deploy:test: npm run build:staging && contentful-app-scripts upload --ci --bundle-dir ./build --organization-id ${DEV_TESTING_ORG_ID} --definition-id 66J3nYAMa13A1O7E8MDDMu --token ${TEST_CMA_TOKEN} && contentful-app-scripts upsert-actions --ci --organization-id ${DEV_TESTING_ORG_ID} --definition-id 66J3nYAMa13A1O7E8MDDMu --token ${TEST_CMA_TOKEN}
